source_pr.title: test: make TestUpdateLeader3 stable
source_pr.body: ### What problem does this PR solve? Problem Summary: test unstable ``` [2020-06-19T14:31:58.522Z] FAIL: region_cache_test.go:240: testRegionCacheSuite.TestUpdateLeader3 [2020-06-19T14:31:58.522Z] [2020-06-19T14:31:58.522Z] region_cache_test.go:281: [2020-06-19T14:31:58.522Z] c.Assert(addr2, Not(Equals), "") [2020-06-19T14:31:58.522Z] ... obtained string = "" [2020-06-19T14:31:58.522Z] ... expected string = "" ``` ### What is changed and how it works? What's Changed, How it Works: it's have a background goroutine to async resolve addr, so it has protention addr can be "" we only need check add1 != addr2 ### Related changes - Need to cherry-pick to the release branch 4.0 ### Check List Tests - Unit test Side effects - n/a ### Release note - No release note --- This change is [](https://reviewable.io/reviews/pingcap/tidb/18156)

root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky due to environment/external dependencies (resource contention, ports, or real cluster timing). This PR stabilizes it by: test: make TestUpdateLeader3 stable.

evidence: evidence: PR title: make TestUpdateLeader3 stable.
evidence: diff removes overly strict non-empty address assertions to reduce test flakes (store/tikv/region_cache_test.go).
